meaning: vt.解除武装,回复平常的编制,缓和,消除(敌意,疑虑)vi.放下武器
examples: The troops will not attempt to disarm the warring militias.
There has also been a suggestion that the forces in Lebanon should disarm.
The superpowers never agreed to disarm.
He must simultaneously suggest offensiveness and disarm it, with an invitation to hip complicity.
Unlike a malicious worm, however, his images were incredibly easy to disarm, despite their aesthetic armor.
